answers: Must-watch: The Shawshank Redemption, Inception, Interstellar, The Dark Knight, Parasite. Mix of genres to keep it interesting!
For thriller lovers: Se7en, Gone Girl, Shutter Island. For feel-good: The Pursuit of Happyness, Forrest Gump, The Secret Life of Walter Mitty.
Top picks by genre: Sci-fi - Interstellar, Arrival. Drama - Whiplash, The Godfather. Animation - Spider-Verse, Your Name.
Check IMDb Top 250 or Letterboxd for curated lists. Recent gems: Oppenheimer, Everything Everywhere All At Once, and The Batman.
